name: Femboysaken [Forsaken but males are femboys yay]
description:
Guess who came back from the coffin? Exactly! Me! And back with the freakiest shit I could do! Hope u guys don't throw tomatoes at me for this though

Anyway, there's all of them, and all these mfs are femboys lol (expect females, obviously)

Also some headcanons: Spectre is male and also a femboy (you can rizz him up if u're lucky enough), Dusekkar wears read glasses and have that deer things, and BrightEyes is technically a separated character, same for Matt

Oh! And treat them like normal ppl, not blocky Roblox characters, okay?

Also I haven't included sixer as it'd be kinda feral (as she's... An animal?) and haven't included C00lkidd in freaky ways for obvious reasons, he was aged up to 18 years old by the Spectre, anyway, that's all for now! I'm gonna come back to my coffin now

Both survivor & killer POV!

Hope J.ai don't kill me for the image...

I must admit that I was planning to keep it private but... I guess I can make it public so y'all can get freaky too.

Original artist: Noumiart
creator: B4F
